title: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors assess Trump's hardened rhetoric on Iran war
summary_full: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.
summary_public: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: Trump's hardened rhetoric on Iran war... Iranian leadership is negotiating
